what_is_fuelox.title: What is FuelOx®?
what_is_fuelox.content: FuelOx® with Combustion Catalyst is a cutting-edge fuel additive engineered to enhance engine performance and longevity. By promoting more complete combustion, this revolutionary formula maximises fuel efficiency while reducing harmful emissions. Its unique composition also helps prevent fuel degradation, moisture accumulation and engine deposits, ensuring optimal fuel quality and engine cleanliness. Trusted by drivers and fleet managers worldwide, FuelOx®with Combustion Catalyst is the go-to solution for achieving peak engine performance an environmental sustainability.

proven_track_record.title: History
content: FuelOx® with Combustion Catalyst was originally developed for ultra high-intensity applications, including use by the United States Department of Defense. Engineered to be soluble in all petroleum-based fuels and extremely concentrated, it was specifically designed to dramatically improve fuel efficiency and extend the longevity of engine components, even in the harshest climates. Its highly concentrated formula allows for easy dosing and minimizes inventory requirements, making it a versatile and cost-effective solution

main_benefit.title: Main benefit
main_benefit.content: Reduces fuel consumption, saving much more than the cost of the FuelOx® additive while reducing environmental damage.

secondary_benefits.title: Secondary benefits
content: Stabilises fuel for long term storage.
EGR Coolers and valves and all sensors stay cleaner.
